name: River Crossing
description: Spring meltwater has swollen the river to a churning torrent. The old ford is submerged and the nearest bridge lies a day's walk upstream. Fallen timber and slippery stones offer a treacherous path across, but one misstep could sweep you downstream.
failureConsequence: The current catches your legs and drags you under. You claw your way to the far bank, gasping and half-drowned, but your pack is lighter — the river claimed a portion of your supplies.
